decks.notes: This deck focuses on utilizing graveyard synergies to quickly reanimate powerful creatures, such as Lotleth Giant, to overwhelm the opponent. By filling the graveyard with creatures using cards like Stinkweed Imp and Satyr Wayfinder, the deck can easily bring back creatures with Dread Return and Malevolent Rumble. The key strategy is to efficiently reanimate creatures while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Masked Vandal and Generous Ent. The deck aims to win through explosive combos and overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of creatures.

The deck is focused on quickly dealing damage to the opponent through a combination of cheap creatures like Firebrand Archer and Guttersnipe, direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast, and card draw/filtering with Faithless Looting. By efficiently utilizing mana and dealing damage early and consistently, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize or mount a defense. The deck emphasizes speed and aggression in order to win the game before the opponent is able to establish control.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with cheap and evasive creatures, backed up by counterspells to protect them from removal or disruption. By playing multiple creatures on each turn and utilizing card draw with cards like Of One Mind, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent and close out the game quickly. The inclusion of bounce spells like Snap and Ninjas of the Deep Hours allows for efficient tempo swings and adds to the deck's aggressive strategy.

This deck focuses on utilizing cheap card draw and counterspells to control the game while also being able to quickly bring out powerful creatures like Cryptic Serpent and Tolarian Terror. The goal is to disrupt the opponent's game plan, dig through the deck for key cards, and overwhelm them with efficient threats. The inclusion of spells like Sleep of the Dead provides additional control options, making it difficult for the opponent to mount a successful offense. With a focus on efficiency and disruption, this deck aims to outmaneuver and outlast the opponent in a battle of wits.

This deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of fast and efficient Elf creatures. By utilizing creatures that produce extra mana and pump up the team's power, the deck aims to quickly build a formidable board presence. Cards like Lead the Stampede and Winding Way help to refill the hand with more Elves, ensuring a constant stream of threats. The inclusion of cards like Masked Vandal and Avenging Hunter provide removal options to deal with opposing threats, while Wellwisher helps to keep the player's life total healthy.

This deck focuses on using a combination of control spells and gate lands to outmaneuver and outlast opponents. By countering spells, removing threats from the board, and gaining card advantage through drawing and flashing back spells, the deck aims to establish a defensive board presence while slowly building towards a win condition. The gate lands provide fixing and mana ramp, allowing the player to efficiently cast their spells and control the game until they can overwhelm the opponent with their creatures or lock down the board with removal spells.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly flood the board with cheap artifacts and creatures to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive attacks. The deck utilizes cards like Myr Enforcer and Utrom Monitor to quickly put pressure on the opponent, while also taking advantage of affinity mechanics to cast spells for reduced cost. The deck also includes removal spells like Galvanic Blast and Nihil Spellbomb to help control the board and secure victories. Overall, the deck aims to quickly establish a dominant board presence and push for a fast victory.

This deck focuses on flooding the board with artifact creatures and utilizing cards like Galvanic Blast and Reckoner's Bargain to deal damage quickly to the opponent. The use of mana-efficient spells and mana-fixing lands helps to keep the aggression going, while cards like Nihil Spellbomb provide disruption against graveyard-based strategies. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient aggro strategy, utilizing the synergy between artifact creatures and spells to create a powerful board presence.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with cheap and efficient creatures, supported by artifact creatures and synergistic spells. By utilizing Affinity mechanics and aggressive creatures, the deck aims to quickly deplete the opponent's life total while maintaining card advantage through cards like Ichor Wellspring and Grim Bauble. Crypt Rats can also serve as a board wipe against creature-heavy opponents, while cards like Blood Fountain and Shambling Ghast provide additional value. The deck aims to be fast and aggressive, utilizing its resources efficiently to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to generate infinite combos by sacrificing creatures like Cauldron Familiar and Myr Retriever with Ashnod's Altar and using various food and artifact cards to fuel the engine. Foundry Inspector and other mana-producing cards help to accelerate the combo, while Malevolent Rumble and Makeshift Munitions provide additional win conditions. The deck aims to create a loop of sacrificing and recurring creatures to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of damage and card advantage, ultimately leading to victory.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive Elf creatures while also generating mana with cards like Priest of Titania. Lead the Stampede and Winding Way help refill the hand, ensuring a steady stream of threats. Timberwatch Elf serves as a powerful finisher, boosting the entire team's power. Overall, the deck aims to quickly build a board presence and maintain pressure on the opponent to secure a victory.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying cheap artifacts and creatures to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. By utilizing cards like Myr Enforcer and Refurbished Familiar, the deck aims to flood the board with threats while also generating card advantage through spells like Thoughtcast. The inclusion of burn spells like Galvanic Blast adds reach to finish off opponents, while also being able to disrupt graveyard strategies with Nihil Spellbomb. The key strategy is to maintain pressure on the opponent while also having ways to control the board and generate value from artifacts.

This deck focuses on quickly controlling the battlefield and dealing direct damage to the opponent through a combination of creature attacks and burn spells. With efficient creatures like Sneaky Snacker and Voldaren Epicure, as well as ample direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast, the goal is to put pressure on the opponent early and finish them off with a burst of burn damage. Cards like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize help to maintain card advantage and ensure a steady stream of threats and burn spells.

This deck focuses on quickly and aggressively dealing damage to the opponent using a combination of low-cost creatures and burn spells. By consistently putting pressure on the opponent's life total with cards like Guttersnipe and Lightning Bolt, the deck aims to win the game before the opponent can stabilize. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize to draw into more burn spells and maintain a steady stream of damage output.

The deck focuses on playing low-cost creatures and disrupting opponents' game plans using counterspells and bounce effects. By consistently applying pressure with efficient creatures like Faerie Miscreant and Ninja of the Deep Hours, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm opponents and secure victories. Additionally, the inclusion of card draw spells like Of One Mind helps to maintain card advantage and ensure a steady stream of threats. By combining tempo plays with aggressive creatures, the deck aims to assert dominance and control the pace of the game.

This Rakdos Aggro deck focuses on maintaining a fast and aggressive playstyle by utilizing low-cost, high-impact creatures like Kitchen Imp and Voldaren Epicure. The deck includes a mix of burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fiery Temper to deal direct damage to opponents and clear the way for attacks. Faithless Looting is used for card draw and filtering, while Alms of the Vein and Vampire's Kiss provide additional lifegain to sustain the aggressive strategy. Grab the Prize and Highway Robbery help to generate extra advantage while the mana base includes a mix of Mountains, Swamps, and Razortrap Gorges.
